_documentation: Populate the 'socials' array below to manage every card on the Socials page and every link in the footer. Each entry needs: platform (one of: discord, github, youtube, tiktok, instagram, facebook, x, reddit, linkedin, twitch, email, website), handle (display label, e.g. '@nexorealm'), url (full link — for email use 'mailto:you@example.com'), icon (a Simple Icons slug matching the platform, e.g. 'github', 'youtube', 'twitch' — see https://simpleicons.org).
